    21	import (
    22	        "context"
    23	        "sync/atomic"
    24	
    25	        submV1 "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/apis/submariner.io/v1"
    26	        k8sV1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
    27	)
    28	
    29	const AnyNetworkPlugin = ""
    30	
    31	type HandlerState interface {
    32	        IsOnGateway() bool
    33	        GetRemoteEndpoints() []submV1.Endpoint
    34	}
    35	
    36	type DefaultHandlerState struct{}
    37	
    38	func (c *DefaultHandlerState) IsOnGateway() bool {
    39	        return false
    40	}
    41	
    42	func (c *DefaultHandlerState) GetRemoteEndpoints() []submV1.Endpoint {
    43	        return nil
    44	}
    45	
    46	type EndpointHandler interface {
    47	        // TransitionToNonGateway is called once for each transition of the local node from Gateway to a non-Gateway.
    48	        TransitionToNonGateway() error
    49	
    50	        // TransitionToGateway is called once for each transition of the local node from non-Gateway to a Gateway.
    51	        TransitionToGateway() error
    52	
    53	        // LocalEndpointCreated is called when an endpoint for the local cluster is created.
    54	        LocalEndpointCreated(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error
    55	
    56	        // LocalEndpointUpdated is called when an endpoint for the local cluster is updated.
    57	        LocalEndpointUpdated(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error
    58	
    59	        // LocalEndpointRemoved is called when an endpoint for the local cluster is removed.
    60	        LocalEndpointRemoved(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error
    61	
    62	        // RemoteEndpointCreated is called when an endpoint associated with a remote cluster is created.
    63	        RemoteEndpointCreated(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error
    64	
    65	        // RemoteEndpointUpdated is called when an endpoint associated with a remote cluster is updated.
    66	        RemoteEndpointUpdated(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error
    67	
    68	        // RemoteEndpointRemoved is called when an endpoint associated with a remote cluster is removed
    69	        RemoteEndpointRemoved(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error
    70	
    71	        // StaleRemoteEndpointRemoved is called in lieu of RemoteEndpointRemoved when a notification for an endpoint
    72	        // associated with a remote cluster is received after a newer endpoint is received from the cluster.
    73	        StaleRemoteEndpointRemoved(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error
    74	}
    75	
    76	type NodeHandler interface {
    77	        // NodeCreated indicates when a node has been added to the cluster
    78	        NodeCreated(node *k8sV1.Node) error
    79	
    80	        // NodeUpdated indicates when a node has been updated in the cluster
    81	        NodeUpdated(node *k8sV1.Node) error
    82	
    83	        // NodeRemoved indicates when a node has been removed from the cluster
    84	        NodeRemoved(node *k8sV1.Node) error
    85	}
    86	
    87	type Handler interface {
    88	        // Init is called once on startup to let the handler initialize any state it needs.
    89	        Init(ctx context.Context) error
    90	
    91	        // SetHandlerState is called once on startup after Init with the HandlerState that can be used to access global data from event callbacks.
    92	        SetState(handlerCtx HandlerState)
    93	
    94	        // GetName returns the name of the event handler
    95	        GetName() string
    96	
    97	        // GetNetworkPlugin returns the kubernetes network plugin that this handler supports.
    98	        GetNetworkPlugins() []string
    99	
   100	        // Stop is called once during shutdown to let the handler perform any cleanup.
   101	        Stop() error
   102	
   103	        // Uninstall is called once after shutdown to let the handler process a Submariner uninstallation.
   104	        Uninstall() error
   105	
   106	        EndpointHandler
   107	}
   108	
   109	// HandlerBase structure for event handlers that stubs out methods considered to be optional.
   110	type HandlerBase struct {
   111	        handlerState atomic.Value
   112	}
   113	
   114	func (ev *HandlerBase) Init(_ context.Context) error {
   115	        return nil
   116	}
   117	
   118	func (ev *HandlerBase) SetState(handlerState HandlerState) {
   119	        ev.handlerState.Store(handlerState)
   120	}
   121	
   122	func (ev *HandlerBase) State() HandlerState {
   123	        hs := ev.handlerState.Load()
   124	        if hs == nil {
   125	                return &DefaultHandlerState{}
   126	        }
   127	
   128	        return hs.(HandlerState)
   129	}
   130	
   131	func (ev *HandlerBase) Stop() error {
   132	        return nil
   133	}
   134	
   135	func (ev *HandlerBase) Uninstall() error {
   136	        return nil
   137	}
   138	
   139	func (ev *HandlerBase) TransitionToNonGateway() error {
   140	        return nil
   141	}
   142

    19	package event
    20	
    21	import (
    22	        "context"
    23	        goerrors "errors"
    24	        "strings"
    25	
    26	        "github.com/pkg/errors"
    27	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/log"
    28	        "k8s.io/utils/set"
    29	        logf "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/log"
    30	)
    31	
    32	type Registry struct {
    33	        name          string
    34	        networkPlugin string
    35	        eventHandlers []Handler
    36	}
    37	
    38	var logger = log.Logger{Logger: logf.Log.WithName("EventRegistry")}
    39	
    40	// NewRegistry creates a new registry with the given name, typically referencing the owner, to manage event
    41	// Handlers that match the given networkPlugin name. The given event Handlers whose associated network plugin matches the given
    42	// networkPlugin name are added. Non-matching Handlers are ignored. Handlers will be called in registration order.
    43	func NewRegistry(ctx context.Context, name, networkPlugin string, eventHandlers ...Handler) (*Registry, error) {
    44	        r := &Registry{
    45	                name:          name,
    46	                networkPlugin: strings.ToLower(networkPlugin),
    47	                eventHandlers: []Handler{},
    48	        }
    49	
    50	        for _, eventHandler := range eventHandlers {
    51	                err := r.addHandler(ctx, eventHandler)
    52	                if err != nil {
    53	                        return nil, err
    54	                }
    55	        }
    56	
    57	        return r, nil
    58	}
    59	
    60	// GetName returns the name of the registry.
    61	func (er *Registry) GetName() string {
    62	        return er.name
    63	}
    64	
    65	func (er *Registry) addHandler(ctx context.Context, eventHandler Handler) error {
    66	        evNetworkPlugins := set.New[string]()
    67	
    68	        for _, np := range eventHandler.GetNetworkPlugins() {
    69	                evNetworkPlugins.Insert(strings.ToLower(np))
    70	        }
    71	
    72	        if er.networkPlugin == AnyNetworkPlugin || evNetworkPlugins.Has(AnyNetworkPlugin) || evNetworkPlugins.Has(er.networkPlugin) {
    73	                if err := eventHandler.Init(ctx); err != nil {
    74	                        return errors.Wrapf(err, "Event handler %q failed to initialize", eventHandler.GetName())
    75	                }
    76	
    77	                er.eventHandlers = append(er.eventHandlers, eventHandler)
    78	                logger.Infof("Event handler %q added to registry %q.", eventHandler.GetName(), er.name)
    79	        } else {
    80	                logger.V(log.DEBUG).Infof("Event handler %q ignored for registry %q as networkPlugin is %q.",
    81	                        eventHandler.GetName(), er.name, er.networkPlugin)
    82	        }
    83	
    84	        return nil
    85	}
    86	
    87	func (er *Registry) GetHandlers() []Handler {
    88	        return er.eventHandlers
    89	}
    90	
    91	func (er *Registry) StopHandlers() error {
    92	        return er.invokeHandlers("Stop", func(h Handler) error {
    93	                return h.Stop()
    94	        })
    95	}
    96	
    97	func (er *Registry) Uninstall() error {
    98	        return er.invokeHandlers("Uninstall", func(h Handler) error {
    99	                return h.Uninstall()
   100	        })
   101	}
   102	
   103	func (er *Registry) invokeHandlers(eventName string, invoke func(h Handler) error) error {
   104	        var errs []error
   105	
   106	        for _, h := range er.eventHandlers {
   107	                err := invoke(h)
   108	                if err != nil {
   109	                        errs = append(errs, errors.Wrapf(err, "%q returned error", h.GetName()))
   110	                }
   111	        }
   112	
   113	        return errors.Wrapf(goerrors.Join(errs...), "%s failed", eventName)
   114	}
   115

    34	const npGenericKubeproxyIptables = "GenericKubeproxyIptables"
    35	
    36	var _ = Describe("Event Registry", func() {
    37	        When("handlers with various network plugins are added to the registry", func() {
    38	                var (
    39	                        matchingHandlers    []*testing.TestHandler
    40	                        nonMatchingHandlers []*testing.TestHandler
    41	                        registry            *event.Registry
    42	                        allTestEvents       chan testing.TestEvent
    43	                )
    44	
    45	                BeforeEach(func() {
    46	                        allTestEvents = make(chan testing.TestEvent, 1000)
    47	
    48	                        nonMatchingHandlers = []*testing.TestHandler{
    49	                                testing.NewTestHandler("ovn-handler", cni.OVNKubernetes, allTestEvents),
    50	                        }
    51	
    52	                        matchingHandlers = []*testing.TestHandler{
    53	                                testing.NewTestHandler("kubeproxy-handler1", npGenericKubeproxyIptables, allTestEvents),
    54	                                testing.NewTestHandler("kubeproxy-handler2", npGenericKubeproxyIptables, allTestEvents),
    55	                                testing.NewTestHandler("wildcard-handler", event.AnyNetworkPlugin, allTestEvents),
    56	                        }
    57	
    58	                        var err error
    59	
    60	                        registry, err = event.NewRegistry(context.TODO(), "test-registry", npGenericKubeproxyIptables, logger.NewHandler(),
    61	                                matchingHandlers[0], nonMatchingHandlers[0], matchingHandlers[1], matchingHandlers[2])
    62	                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
    63	                        Expect(registry.GetName()).To(Equal("test-registry"))
    64	                })
    65	
    66	                It("should initialize all matching handlers", func() {
    67	                        for _, h := range matchingHandlers {
    68	                                Expect(h.Initialized).To(BeTrue())
    69	                        }
    70	
    71	                        for _, h := range nonMatchingHandlers {
    72	                                Expect(h.Initialized).To(BeFalse())
    73	                        }
    74	                })
    75	
    76	                It("should invoke all matching handlers of all events in registration order", func() {
    77	                        for ev, f := range allEvents(registry) {
    78	                                err := f()
    79	                                Expect(err).To(Succeed())
    80	
    81	                                for _, h := range matchingHandlers {
    82	                                        ev.Handler = h.Name
    83	                                        Expect(allTestEvents).To(Receive(Equal(ev)))
    84	                                }
    85	                        }
    86	
    87	                        Expect(allTestEvents).ToNot(Receive())
    88	                })
    89	
    90	                When("one handler returns an error", func() {
    91	                        It("should invoke subsequent matching handlers", func() {
    92	                                events := allEvents(registry)
    93	                                for ev := range events {
    94	                                        matchingHandlers[0].FailOnEvent(ev.Name)
    95	                                }
    96	
    97	                                for ev, f := range events {
    98	                                        err := f()
    99	                                        Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
   100	
   101	                                        for i := 1; i < len(matchingHandlers); i++ {
   102	                                                ev.Handler = matchingHandlers[i].Name
   103	                                                Expect(allTestEvents).To(Receive(Equal(ev)))
   104	                                        }
   105	                                }
   106	                        })
   107	                })
   108	
   109	                Specify("GetHandlers should return all the handlers", func() {
   110	                        handlers := registry.GetHandlers()
   111	                        Expect(handlers).To(ContainElements(matchingHandlers))
   112	                })
   113	        })
   114	
   115	        When("a handler's Init fails", func() {
   116	                It("NewRegistry should return an error", func() {
   117	                        h := testing.NewTestHandler("test-handler", event.AnyNetworkPlugin, make(chan testing.TestEvent, 10))
   118	                        h.FailOnEvent(testing.EvInit)
   119	
   120	                        _, err := event.NewRegistry(context.TODO(), "test-registry", event.AnyNetworkPlugin, h)
   121	                        Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
   122	                })
   123	        })
   124	})
   125	
   126	var _ = Describe("Event Handler", func() {
   127	        When("SetState has not been called", func() {
   128	                Specify("State should return a default instance", func() {
   129	                        h := testing.NewTestHandler("test", event.AnyNetworkPlugin, nil)
   130	                        state := h.State()
   131	                        Expect(state).ToNot(BeNil())
   132	                        Expect(state.IsOnGateway()).To(BeFalse())
   133	                        Expect(state.GetRemoteEndpoints()).To(BeEmpty())
   134	                })
   135	        })

   143	                })
   144	        })

   166	func allEvents(registry *event.Registry) map[testing.TestEvent]func() error {

    83	
    84	func (t *TestHandlerBase) FailOnEvent(eventName ...string) {
    85	        for _, e := range eventName {
    86	                t.failOnEvent.Store(e, true)
    87	        }
    88	}
    89	
    90	func (t *TestHandlerBase) checkFailOnEvent(eventName string) error {
    91	        fail, ok := t.failOnEvent.LoadAndDelete(eventName)
    92	        if ok && fail.(bool) {
    93	                return fmt.Errorf("mock handler error for %q", eventName)
    94	        }
    95	
    96	        return nil
    97	}
    98	
    99	func (t *TestHandlerBase) addEvent(eventName string, param any) error {
   100	        if err := t.checkFailOnEvent(eventName); err != nil {
   101	                return err
   102	        }
   103	
   104	        ev := TestEvent{
   105	                Name:      eventName,
   106	                Parameter: param,
   107	                Handler:   t.Name,
   108	        }
   109	
   110	        select {
   111	        case t.Events <- ev:
   112	                return nil
   113	        case <-time.After(5 * time.Second):
   114	                return fmt.Errorf("timeout sending event %q to channel", eventName)
   115	        }
   116	}
   117	
   118	func (t *TestHandlerBase) Init(_ context.Context) error {
   119	        t.Initialized = true
   120	        return t.checkFailOnEvent(EvInit)
   121	}

   124	        return t.Name
   125	}

   128	        return []string{t.NetworkPlugin}

    50	type ControllerSupport struct {
    51	        Hostname  string
    52	        endpoints dynamic.ResourceInterface
    53	        nodes     dynamic.ResourceInterface
    54	}
    55	
    56	func NewControllerSupport() *ControllerSupport {
    57	        c := &ControllerSupport{}
    58	        c.Hostname, _ = os.Hostname()
    59	
    60	        return c
    61	}
    62	
    63	func (c *ControllerSupport) Start(handlers ...event.Handler) {
    64	        stopCh := make(chan struct{})
    65	
    66	        networkPlugin := handlers[0].GetNetworkPlugins()[0]
    67	        if len(handlers) > 1 {
    68	                networkPlugin = event.AnyNetworkPlugin
    69	        }
    70	
    71	        registry, err := event.NewRegistry(context.TODO(), "test-registry", networkPlugin, handlers...)
    72	        Expect(err).To(Succeed())
    73	
    74	        config := controller.Config{
    75	                RestMapper: test.GetRESTMapperFor(&corev1.Node{}, &submV1.Endpoint{}),
    76	                Client:     dynamicfake.NewSimpleDynamicClient(scheme.Scheme),
    77	                Registry:   registry,
    78	        }
    79	
    80	        os.Setenv("SUBMARINER_NAMESPACE", Namespace)
    81	        os.Setenv("SUBMARINER_CLUSTERID", LocalClusterID)
    82	
    83	        c.nodes = config.Client.Resource(*test.GetGroupVersionResourceFor(config.RestMapper, &corev1.Node{}))
    84	        c.endpoints = config.Client.Resource(*test.GetGroupVersionResourceFor(config.RestMapper, &submV1.Endpoint{})).Namespace(Namespace)
    85	
    86	        eventController, err := controller.New(&config)
    87	
    88	        Expect(err).To(Succeed())
    89	        Expect(eventController.Start(stopCh)).To(Succeed())
    90	
    91	        testutil.AwaitWatchAction(&(config.Client.(*dynamicfake.FakeDynamicClient)).Fake, "endpoints")
    92	
    93	        DeferCleanup(func() {
    94	                close(stopCh)
    95	                eventController.Stop()
    96	        })
    97	}
    98	
    99	func NewEndpoint(clusterID, hostname string, subnets ...string) *submV1.Endpoint {
   100	        return &submV1.Endpoint{
   101	                ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
   102	                        Name: string(uuid.NewUUID()),
   103	                },
   104	                Spec: submV1.EndpointSpec{
   105	                        ClusterID: clusterID,
   106	                        Hostname:  hostname,
   107	                        Subnets:   subnets,
   108	                },
   109	        }
   110	}
   111	
   112	func (c *ControllerSupport) CreateLocalHostEndpoint() *submV1.Endpoint {
   113	        return c.CreateEndpoint(NewEndpoint(LocalClusterID, c.Hostname))
   114	}

   116	func (c *ControllerSupport) CreateEndpoint(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) *submV1.Endpoint {
   117	        endpoint.UID = uuid.NewUUID()
   118	        Expect(scheme.Scheme.Convert(test.CreateResource(c.endpoints, endpoint), endpoint, nil)).To(Succeed())
   119	
   120	        return endpoint
   121	}

   123	func (c *ControllerSupport) UpdateEndpoint(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) {
   124	        test.UpdateResource(c.endpoints, endpoint)
   125	}

    19	package controller
    20	
    21	import (
    22	        "fmt"
    23	        "os"
    24	        "sync"
    25	        "sync/atomic"
    26	
    27	        "github.com/kelseyhightower/envconfig"
    28	        "github.com/pkg/errors"
    29	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/federate"
    30	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/log"
    31	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/syncer"
    32	        subv1 "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/apis/submariner.io/v1"
    33	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/event"
    34	        k8sv1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
    35	        "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta"
    36	        "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
    37	        "k8s.io/client-go/dynamic"
    38	        "k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache"
    39	        logf "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/log"
    40	)
    41	
    42	type specification struct {
    43	        ClusterID string
    44	        Namespace string
    45	}
    46	
    47	type handlerStateImpl struct {
    48	        isOnGateway     atomic.Bool
    49	        wasOnGateway    bool
    50	        remoteEndpoints sync.Map
    51	}
    52	
    53	func (s *handlerStateImpl) setIsOnGateway(v bool) {
    54	        s.isOnGateway.Store(v)
    55	}
    56	
    57	func (s *handlerStateImpl) IsOnGateway() bool {
    58	        return s.isOnGateway.Load()
    59	}
    60	
    61	func (s *handlerStateImpl) GetRemoteEndpoints() []subv1.Endpoint {
    62	        var endpoints []subv1.Endpoint
    63	
    64	        s.remoteEndpoints.Range(func(_, value any) bool {
    65	                endpoints = append(endpoints, *value.(*subv1.Endpoint))
    66	                return true
    67	        })
    68	
    69	        return endpoints
    70	}
    71	
    72	type Controller struct {
    73	        endpointInformer cache.SharedInformer
    74	        nodeInformer     cache.SharedInformer
    75	        syncers          []syncer.Interface
    76	        handlers         *event.Registry
    77	}
    78	
    79	type handlerController struct {
    80	        syncMutex          sync.Mutex
    81	        handlerState       handlerStateImpl
    82	        handler            event.Handler
    83	        nodeHandler        event.NodeHandler
    84	        hostname           string
    85	        clusterID          string
    86	        lastRemoteEndpoint map[string]*subv1.Endpoint
    87	}
    88	
    89	// If the handler cannot recover from a failure, even after retrying for maximum requeue attempts,
    90	// it's best to disregard the event. This prevents the logs from being flooded with repetitive errors.
    91	const maxRequeues = 20
    92	
    93	type Config struct {
    94	        // Registry is the event handler registry where controller events will be sent.
    95	        Registry   *event.Registry
    96	        RestMapper meta.RESTMapper
    97	        Client     dynamic.Interface
    98	        Scheme     *runtime.Scheme
    99	}
   100	
   101	var logger = log.Logger{Logger: logf.Log.WithName("EventController")}
   102	
   103	func New(config *Config) (*Controller, error) {
   104	        hostname, err := os.Hostname()
   105	        if err != nil {
   106	                return nil, errors.Wrapf(err, "unable to read hostname")
   107	        }
   108	
   109	        ctl := Controller{
   110	                handlers: config.Registry,
   111	        }
   112	
   113	        var env specification
   114	
   115	        err = envconfig.Process("submariner", &env)
   116	        if err != nil {
   117	                return nil, errors.Wrap(err, "error processing env vars")
   118	        }
   119	
   120	        syncerConfig := &syncer.ResourceSyncerConfig{
   121	                SourceNamespace: env.Namespace,
   122	                SourceClient:    config.Client,
   123	                RestMapper:      config.RestMapper,
   124	                Federator:       federate.NewNoopFederator(),
   125	                ResourceType:    &subv1.Endpoint{},
   126	        }
   127	
   128	        ctl.endpointInformer, err = syncer.NewSharedInformer(syncerConfig)
   129	        if err != nil {
   130	                return nil, errors.Wrap(err, "error creating endpoint informer")
   131	        }
   132	
   133	        for _, handler := range config.Registry.GetHandlers() {
   134	                err = ctl.setupHandlerController(handler, env.ClusterID, hostname, *syncerConfig)
   135	                if err != nil {
   136	                        return nil, err
   137	                }
   138	        }
   139	
   140	        return &ctl, nil
   141	}
   142	
   143	// Start starts the controller.
   144	func (c *Controller) Start(stopCh <-chan struct{}) error {
   145	        logger.Info("Starting the Event controller...")
   146	
   147	        runInformer(c.endpointInformer, stopCh)
   148	        runInformer(c.nodeInformer, stopCh)
   149	
   150	        for _, s := range c.syncers {
   151	                err := s.Start(stopCh)
   152	                if err != nil {
   153	                        return errors.Wrap(err, "error starting resource syncer")
   154	                }
   155	        }
   156	
   157	        logger.Info("Event controller started")
   158	
   159	        return nil
   160	}
   161	
   162	func (c *Controller) Stop() {
   163	        logger.Info("Event controller stopping")
   164	
   165	        if err := c.handlers.StopHandlers(); err != nil {
   166	                logger.Warningf("In Event Controller, StopHandlers returned error: %v", err)
   167	        }
   168	}
   169	
   170	//nolint:gocritic // Ignore hugeParam - intentional copy.
   171	func (c *Controller) setupHandlerController(handler event.Handler, clusterID, hostname string,
   172	        syncerConfig syncer.ResourceSyncerConfig,
   173	) error {
   174	        hCtrl := &handlerController{
   175	                handler:            handler,
   176	                hostname:           hostname,
   177	                clusterID:          clusterID,
   178	                lastRemoteEndpoint: map[string]*subv1.Endpoint{},
   179	        }
   180	
   181	        handler.SetState(&hCtrl.handlerState)
   182	
   183	        syncerConfig.Name = fmt.Sprintf("Endpoint watcher for handler %q", handler.GetName())
   184	
   185	        syncerConfig.Transform = func(obj runtime.Object, numRequeues int, op syncer.Operation) (runtime.Object, bool) {
   186	                switch op {
   187	                case syncer.Create:
   188	                        return nil, hCtrl.handleCreatedEndpoint(obj.(*subv1.Endpoint), numRequeues)
   189	                case syncer.Update:
   190	                        return nil, hCtrl.handleUpdatedEndpoint(obj.(*subv1.Endpoint), numRequeues)
   191	                case syncer.Delete:
   192	                        return nil, hCtrl.handleRemovedEndpoint(obj.(*subv1.Endpoint), numRequeues)
   193	                }
   194	
   195	                return nil, false
   196	        }
   197	
   198	        endpointSyncer, err := syncer.NewResourceSyncerWithSharedInformer(&syncerConfig, c.endpointInformer)
   199	        if err != nil {
   200	                return errors.Wrap(err, "error creating resource syncer")
   201	        }
   202	
   203	        c.syncers = append(c.syncers, endpointSyncer)
   204	
   205	        var ok bool
   206	
   207	        hCtrl.nodeHandler, ok = hCtrl.handler.(event.NodeHandler)
   208	        if ok {
   209	                syncerConfig.Name = fmt.Sprintf("Node watcher for handler %q", handler.GetName())
   210	                syncerConfig.ResourceType = &k8sv1.Node{}
   211	                syncerConfig.SourceNamespace = k8sv1.NamespaceAll
   212	
   213	                if c.nodeInformer == nil {
   214	                        c.nodeInformer, err = syncer.NewSharedInformer(&syncerConfig)
   215	                        if err != nil {
   216	                                return errors.Wrap(err, "error creating node informer")
   217	                        }
   218	                }
   219	
   220	                syncerConfig.Transform = func(obj runtime.Object, numRequeues int, op syncer.Operation) (runtime.Object, bool) {
   221	                        switch op {
   222	                        case syncer.Create:
   223	                                return nil, hCtrl.handleCreatedNode(obj.(*k8sv1.Node), numRequeues)
   224	                        case syncer.Update:
   225	                                return nil, hCtrl.handleUpdatedNode(obj.(*k8sv1.Node), numRequeues)
   226	                        case syncer.Delete:
   227	                                return nil, hCtrl.handleRemovedNode(obj.(*k8sv1.Node), numRequeues)
   228	                        }
   229	
   230	                        return nil, false
   231	                }
   232	
   233	                nodeSyncer, err := syncer.NewResourceSyncerWithSharedInformer(&syncerConfig, c.nodeInformer)
   234	                if err != nil {
   235	                        return errors.Wrap(err, "error creating resource syncer")
   236	                }
   237	
   238	                c.syncers = append(c.syncers, nodeSyncer)
   239	        }
   240	
   241	        return nil
   242	}
   243	
   244	func runInformer(informer cache.SharedInformer, stopCh <-chan struct{}) {
   245	        if informer != nil {
   246	                go func() {
   247	                        informer.Run(stopCh)
   248	                }()
   249	        }
   250	}
   251

    13	distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    14	WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

    19	package main
    20	
    21	import (
    22	        "flag"
    23	        "io/fs"
    24	        "os"
    25	        "strconv"
    26	        "syscall"
    27	        "time"
    28	
    29	        "github.com/kelseyhightower/envconfig"
    30	        "github.com/pkg/errors"
    31	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/configmap"
    32	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/global"
    33	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/http"
    34	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/log"
    35	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/log/kzerolog"
    36	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/names"
    37	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/resource"
    38	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/util"
    39	        admversion "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/version"
    40	        "github.com/submariner-io/admiral/pkg/watcher"
    41	        v1 "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/apis/submariner.io/v1"
    42	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/cidr"
    43	        submarinerClientset "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/client/clientset/versioned"
    44	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/cni"
    45	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/event"
    46	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/event/controller"
    47	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/node"
    48	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/packetfilter"
    49	        pfconfigure "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/packetfilter/configure"
    50	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/packetfilter/iptables"
    51	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/pinger"
    52	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/cabledriver"
    53	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/chains"
    54	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/environment"
    55	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/handlers/calico"
    56	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/handlers/healthchecker"
    57	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/handlers/kubeproxy"
    58	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/handlers/mtu"
    59	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/routeagent_driver/handlers/ovn"
    60	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/types"
    61	        "github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pkg/versions"
    62	        corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
    63	        metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
    64	        "k8s.io/client-go/dynamic"
    65	        "k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
    66	        "k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/scheme"
    67	        "k8s.io/client-go/tools/clientcmd"
    68	        logf "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/log"
    69	        "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/manager/signals"
    70	)
    71	
    72	var (
    73	        masterURL   string
    74	        kubeconfig  string
    75	        logger      = log.Logger{Logger: logf.Log.WithName("main")}
    76	        showVersion = false
    77	)
    78	
    79	func main() {
    80	        kzerolog.AddFlags(nil)
    81	        flag.Parse()
    82	
    83	        admversion.Print(names.RouteAgentComponent, versions.Submariner())
    84	
    85	        if showVersion {
    86	                return
    87	        }
    88	
    89	        kzerolog.InitK8sLogging()
    90	
    91	        versions.Log(&logger)
    92	
    93	        logger.Info("Starting submariner-route-agent using the event framework")
    94	        // set up signals so we handle the first shutdown signal gracefully
    95	        ctx := signals.SetupSignalHandler()
    96	
    97	        // Clean up "sockets" created as directories by previous versions
    98	        removeInvalidSockets()
    99	
   100	        var env environment.Specification
   101	
   102	        err := envconfig.Process("submariner", &env)
   103	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error reading the environment variables")
   104	
   105	        cfg, err := clientcmd.BuildConfigFromFlags(masterURL, kubeconfig)
   106	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error building kubeconfig")
   107	
   108	        k8sClientSet, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(cfg)
   109	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error building clientset")
   110	
   111	        dynamicClientSet, err := dynamic.NewForConfig(cfg)
   112	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error building dynamic clientr")
   113	
   114	        err = v1.AddToScheme(scheme.Scheme)
   115	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error adding submariner to the scheme")
   116	
   117	        smClientset, err := submarinerClientset.NewForConfig(cfg)
   118	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error building submariner clientset")
   119	
   120	        restMapper, err := util.BuildRestMapper(cfg)
   121	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error building the REST mapper")
   122	
   123	        globalConfigMap, err := configmap.Get(ctx, resource.ForConfigMap(k8sClientSet, env.Namespace), configmap.Global)
   124	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error retrieving the global ConfigMap")
   125	
   126	        configMap, err := configmap.Get(ctx, resource.ForConfigMap(k8sClientSet, env.Namespace), names.RouteAgentComponent)
   127	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error retrieving ConfigMap")
   128	
   129	        global.Init(globalConfigMap, configMap)
   130	
   131	        configmap.WatchAndSignalOnChange(ctx, k8sClientSet, env.Namespace, syscall.SIGINT, configmap.Global, names.RouteAgentComponent)
   132	
   133	        pfconfigure.DriverFromGlobalConfig()
   134	
   135	        np := os.Getenv("SUBMARINER_NETWORKPLUGIN")
   136	
   137	        if np == "" {
   138	                np = cni.Generic
   139	        }
   140	
   141	        submSpec := types.SubmarinerSpecification{}
   142	        logger.FatalOnError(envconfig.Process("submariner", &submSpec), "Error processing env vars")
   143	
   144	        config := &watcher.Config{RestConfig: cfg}
   145	
   146	        localNode, err := node.GetLocalNode(ctx, k8sClientSet)
   147	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error getting information on the local node")
   148	
   149	        pod, err := k8sClientSet.CoreV1().Pods(submSpec.Namespace).Get(ctx, os.Getenv("POD_NAME"), metav1.GetOptions{})
   150	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error getting local Pod %q", os.Getenv("POD_NAME"))
   151	
   152	        var handlers []event.Handler
   153	
   154	        for _, family := range cidr.ExtractIPFamilies(env.ClusterCidr) {
   155	                handlers = append(handlers,
   156	                        kubeproxy.NewSyncHandler(family, env.ClusterCidr, env.ServiceCidr),
   157	                        mtu.NewHandler(family, env.ClusterCidr, len(env.GlobalCidr) != 0, getTCPMssValue(localNode)))
   158	
   159	                handlers = append(handlers, ovn.GetHandlers(family, &env, smClientset, k8sClientSet, dynamicClientSet, config)...)
   160	        }
   161	
   162	        handlers = append(handlers,
   163	                cabledriver.NewXRFMCleanupHandler(),
   164	                cabledriver.NewVXLANCleanup(),
   165	                calico.NewCalicoIPPoolHandler(cfg, env.Namespace, dynamicClientSet),
   166	                healthchecker.New(&healthchecker.Config{
   167	                        ControllerConfig: pinger.ControllerConfig{
   168	                                SupportedIPFamilies: submSpec.GetIPFamilies(),
   169	                                PingInterval:        submSpec.HealthCheckInterval * 60,
   170	                                MaxPacketLossCount:  submSpec.HealthCheckMaxPacketLossCount,
   171	                        },
   172	                        HealthCheckerEnabled:     submSpec.HealthCheckEnabled,
   173	                        RouteAgentUpdateInterval: 60 * time.Second,
   174	                        RouteAgentOwner:          pod,
   175	                        LocalNodeName:            localNode.Name,
   176	                        Version:                  versions.Submariner(),
   177	                        Namespace:                submSpec.Namespace,
   178	                }, smClientset.SubmarinerV1()))
   179	
   180	        registry, err := event.NewRegistry(ctx, "routeagent_driver", np, handlers...)
   181	
   182	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error registering the handlers")
   183	
   184	        if env.Uninstall {
   185	                uninstall(registry)
   186	
   187	                for _, family := range cidr.ExtractIPFamilies(env.ClusterCidr) {
   188	                        pFilter, err := packetfilter.New(family)
   189	                        if err != nil {
   190	                                logger.Errorf(err, "error creating packetfilter instance for IPv%v", family)
   191	                                continue
   192	                        }
   193	
   194	                        if err := pFilter.Uninstall(); err != nil {
   195	                                logger.Errorf(err, "error Cleanup packetfilter table for IPv%v", family)
   196	                        }
   197	                }
   198	
   199	                return
   200	        }
   201	
   202	        defer http.StartServer(http.Profile, env.ProfilePort)()
   203	
   204	        ctl, err := controller.New(&controller.Config{
   205	                Registry:   registry,
   206	                Client:     dynamicClientSet,
   207	                RestMapper: restMapper,
   208	        })
   209	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error creating controller for event handling")
   210	
   211	        stopCh := ctx.Done()
   212	
   213	        err = ctl.Start(stopCh)
   214	        logger.FatalOnError(err, "Error starting controller")
   215	
   216	        cleanupLegacyIptables(env.ClusterCidr)
   217	
   218	        <-stopCh
   219	        ctl.Stop()
   220	
   221	        logger.Info("All controllers stopped or exited. Stopping submariner-route-agent")
   222	}
   223	
   224	func init() {
   225	        flag.StringVar(&kubeconfig, "kubeconfig", "", "Path to a kubeconfig. Only required if out-of-cluster.")
   226	        flag.StringVar(&masterURL, "master", "",
   227	                "The address of the Kubernetes API server. Overrides any value in kubeconfig. Only required if out-of-cluster.")
   228	        flag.BoolVar(&showVersion, "version", showVersion, "Show version")
   229	}
   230	
   231	func getTCPMssValue(localNode *corev1.Node) int {
   232	        tcpMssStr := localNode.GetAnnotations()[v1.TCPMssValue]
   233	
   234	        if tcpMssStr == "" {
   235	                return 0
   236	        }
   237	
   238	        tcpMssValue, err := strconv.Atoi(tcpMssStr)
   239	        if err != nil {
   240	                logger.Errorf(err, "Error parsing %q annotation", v1.TCPMssValue)
   241	                return 0
   242	        }
   243	
   244	        return tcpMssValue
   245	}
   246	
   247	func uninstall(registry *event.Registry) {
   248	        if err := registry.StopHandlers(); err != nil {
   249	                logger.Warningf("Error stopping handlers: %v", err)
   250	        }
   251	
   252	        if err := registry.Uninstall(); err != nil {
   253	                logger.Warningf("Error uninstalling handlers: %v", err)
   254	        }
   255	}
   256	
   257	func removeInvalidSockets() {
   258	        // This can be removed once we stop supporting upgrades from 0.16.0 or older
   259	        for _, dir := range []string{"/run/openvswitch/db.sock", "/var/run/openvswitch/ovnnb_db.sock", "/var/run/ovn-ic/ovnnb_db.sock"} {
   260	                info, err := os.Stat(dir)
   261	                if (err == nil || errors.Is(err, fs.ErrExist)) && info.IsDir() {
   262	                        err := os.Remove(dir)
   263	                        if err != nil {
   264	                                logger.Errorf(err, "Failed to delete invalid socket %s", dir)
   265	                        } else {
   266	                                logger.Infof("Deleted invalid socket %s", dir)
   267	                        }
   268	                }
   269	        }
   270	}
   271	
   272	// =============================================================================
   273	// TEMPORARY: iptables cleanup for migration to nftables
   274	// This entire section can be removed once migration is complete
   275	// =============================================================================
   276	
   277	func cleanupLegacyIptables(clusterCidr []string) {
   278	        if pfconfigure.GetDriverType() == pfconfigure.IPTables {
   279	                return
   280	        }
   281	
   282	        ipHookChains := []struct {
   283	                Table packetfilter.TableType
   284	                Chain *packetfilter.ChainIPHook
   285	        }{
   286	                {
   287	                        Table: packetfilter.TableTypeNAT,
   288	                        Chain: chains.NewPostRouting(),
   289	                },
   290	                {
   291	                        Table: packetfilter.TableTypeFilter,
   292	                        Chain: chains.NewInput(),
   293	                },
   294	                {
   295	                        Table: packetfilter.TableTypeNAT,
   296	                        Chain: chains.NewSelfSnat(),
   297	                },
   298	                {
   299	                        Table: packetfilter.TableTypeFilter,
   300	                        Chain: chains.NewForwarding(),
   301	                },
   302	                {
   303	                        Table: packetfilter.TableTypeFilter,
   304	                        Chain: chains.NewForwardingMSSClamp(),
   305	                },
   306	                {
   307	                        Table: packetfilter.TableTypeRoute,
   308	                        Chain: &packetfilter.ChainIPHook{
   309	                                Name:     chains.SmPostRoutingMss,
   310	                                Type:     packetfilter.ChainTypeRoute,
   311	                                Hook:     packetfilter.ChainHookPostrouting,
   312	                                Priority: packetfilter.ChainPriorityFirst,
   313	                        },
   314	                },
   315	        }
   316	
   317	        for _, family := range cidr.ExtractIPFamilies(clusterCidr) {
   318	                pIPtables, err := iptables.New(family)
   319	                if err != nil {
   320	                        logger.Errorf(err, "Failed to create IPv%v iptables driver for cleanup", family)
   321	                        continue
   322	                }
   323	
   324	                for _, item := range ipHookChains {
   325	                        _ = pIPtables.ClearChain(item.Table, item.Chain.Name)
   326	
   327	                        if err := pIPtables.DeleteIPHookChain(item.Chain); err != nil {
   328	                                logger.V(log.DEBUG).Infof("Failed to delete IPv%v iptables IP hook chain %q: %v", family, item.Chain.Name, err)
   329	                        } else {
   330	                                logger.Infof("Cleaned up IPv%v iptables IP hook chain %q", family, item.Chain.Name)
   331	                        }
   332	                }
   333	        }
   334	}
   335

    45

    48

    50

    52	
    53	                        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvNodeRemoved, node)
    54	                        t.ensureNoEvents()
    55	                })
    56	        })
    57	
    58	        When("a local Endpoint on this host is created, updated and deleted", func() {
    59	                It("should correctly notify the handler", func() {
    60	                        t.testLocalEndpoint()
    61	                })
    62	        })
    63	
    64	        When("remote Endpoints are created, updated and deleted", func() {
    65	                It("should correctly notify the handler", func() {
    66	                        t.testRemoteEndpoints()
    67	                })
    68	        })
    69	
    70	        When("the handler returns an error from an event notification", func() {
    71	                It("should retry the event", func() {
    72	                        t.handler.FailOnEvent(testing.EvLocalEndpointCreated, testing.EvLocalEndpointUpdated, testing.EvLocalEndpointRemoved,
    73	                                testing.EvTransitionToGateway, testing.EvTransitionToNonGateway, testing.EvRemoteEndpointCreated,
    74	                                testing.EvRemoteEndpointUpdated, testing.EvRemoteEndpointRemoved)
    75	
    76	                        t.testLocalEndpoint()
    77	                        t.testRemoteEndpoints()
    78	                })
    79	        })
    80	
    81	        Context("with multiple event handlers", func() {
    82	                const (
    83	                        allEventsHandler     = "all-events"
    84	                        endpointsOnlyHandler = "endpoints-only"
    85	                )
    86	
    87	                var handler2Events, endpointsOnlyHandlerEvents chan testing.TestEvent
    88	
    89	                BeforeEach(func() {
    90	                        handler2Events = make(chan testing.TestEvent, 1000)
    91	                        endpointsOnlyHandlerEvents = make(chan testing.TestEvent, 1000)
    92	
    93	                        t.handlers = []event.Handler{
    94	                                t.handler,
    95	                                testing.NewTestHandler(allEventsHandler, event.AnyNetworkPlugin, handler2Events),
    96	                                testing.NewEndpointsOnlyHandler(endpointsOnlyHandler, event.AnyNetworkPlugin, endpointsOnlyHandlerEvents),
    97	                        }
    98	                })
    99	
   100	                It("should correctly notify all handlers", func() {
   101	                        By("Create local Endpoint")
   102	
   103	                        endpoint := t.CreateLocalHostEndpoint()
   104	
   105	                        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvLocalEndpointCreated, endpoint)
   106	                        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvTransitionToGateway, nil)
   107

   109	                        awaitEvent(allEventsHandler, testing.EvTransitionToGateway, nil, handler2Events)
   110	
   111	                        awaitEvent(endpointsOnlyHandler, testing.EvLocalEndpointCreated, endpoint, endpointsOnlyHandlerEvents)
   112	                        awaitEvent(endpointsOnlyHandler, testing.EvTransitionToGateway, nil, endpointsOnlyHandlerEvents)
   113	
   114	                        By("Create node")
   115	
   116	                        node := t.CreateNode(testing.NewNode(t.Hostname))
   117	
   118	                        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvNodeCreated, node)
   119	                        awaitEvent(allEventsHandler, testing.EvNodeCreated, node, handler2Events)
   120	                        Consistently(endpointsOnlyHandlerEvents).ShouldNot(Receive())
   121	                })
   122	        })
   123	
   124	        When("multiple remote Endpoints for the same cluster are created and removed", func() {
   125	                It("should only notify the handler of the latest Endpoint", func() {
   126	                        now := time.Now()
   127	                        aFewSecondsLater := now.Add(2 * time.Second)
   128	
   129	                        latestEndpoint := t.CreateEndpoint(&submV1.Endpoint{
   130	                                ObjectMeta: v1meta.ObjectMeta{Name: "latest", CreationTimestamp: v1meta.NewTime(aFewSecondsLater)},
   131	                                Spec:       submV1.EndpointSpec{ClusterID: "east"},
   132	                        })
   133	                        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointCreated, latestEndpoint)
   134	
   135	                        staleEndpoint := t.CreateEndpoint(&submV1.Endpoint{
   136	                                ObjectMeta: v1meta.ObjectMeta{Name: "stale", CreationTimestamp: v1meta.NewTime(now)},
   137	                                Spec:       submV1.EndpointSpec{ClusterID: "east"},
   138	                        })
   139	                        t.ensureNoEvents()
   140	                        Expect(t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()).To(Equal([]submV1.Endpoint{*latestEndpoint}))
   141	
   142	                        t.DeleteEndpoint(staleEndpoint.GetName())
   143	                        Consistently(func() any {
   144	                                return t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()
   145	                        }).Should(Equal([]submV1.Endpoint{*latestEndpoint}))
   146	
   147	                        t.DeleteEndpoint(latestEndpoint.GetName())
   148	                        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointRemoved, latestEndpoint)
   149	
   150	                        t.CreateEndpoint(staleEndpoint)
   151	                        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointCreated, staleEndpoint)
   152	                })
   153	        })
   154	
   155	        When("a remote Endpoint is deleted after a newer Endpoint from the same cluster", func() {
   156	                t.testStaleRemovedEndpoint(2 * time.Second)
   157	        })
   158	
   159	        When("a remote Endpoint with thw same CreationTimestamp as the last Endpoint from the same cluster is deleted", func() {
   160	                t.testStaleRemovedEndpoint(0)
   161	        })
   162	})
   163	
   164	type testDriver struct {
   165	        *testing.ControllerSupport
   166	        testEvents chan testing.TestEvent
   167	        handler    *TestHandler
   168	        handlers   []event.Handler
   169	}
   170	
   171	func newTestDriver() *testDriver {
   172	        t := &testDriver{
   173	                ControllerSupport: testing.NewControllerSupport(),
   174	        }
   175	
   176	        BeforeEach(func() {
   177	                t.testEvents = make(chan testing.TestEvent, 1000)
   178	                t.handler = &TestHandler{
   179	                        TestHandler: testing.NewTestHandler(testHandlerName, event.AnyNetworkPlugin, t.testEvents),
   180	                }
   181	                t.handlers = []event.Handler{t.handler}
   182	        })
   183	
   184	        JustBeforeEach(func() {
   185	                t.Start(t.handlers...)
   186	        })
   187	
   188	        return t
   189	}
   190	
   191	func (t *testDriver) awaitEvent(name string, param any) {
   192	        awaitEvent(testHandlerName, name, param, t.testEvents)
   193	}
   194	
   195	func awaitEvent(handler, name string, param any, eventCh chan testing.TestEvent) {
   196	        Eventually(eventCh).Should(Receive(Equal(
   197	                testing.TestEvent{Handler: handler, Name: name, Parameter: param})))
   198	}
   199	
   200	func (t *testDriver) ensureNoEvents() {
   201	        Consistently(t.testEvents).ShouldNot(Receive())
   202	}
   203	
   204	func (t *testDriver) testLocalEndpoint() {
   205	        By("Create local Endpoint")
   206	
   207	        endpoint := t.CreateLocalHostEndpoint()
   208	
   209	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvLocalEndpointCreated, endpoint)
   210	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvTransitionToGateway, nil)
   211	
   212	        t.CreateLocalHostEndpoint()
   213	        Consistently(t.testEvents).ShouldNot(Receive(Equal(
   214	                testing.TestEvent{Handler: testHandlerName, Name: testing.EvTransitionToGateway})))
   215	
   216	        By("Update local Endpoint")
   217	
   218	        endpoint.Labels = map[string]string{"labeled-i-am": "i-am"}
   219	        t.UpdateEndpoint(endpoint)
   220	
   221	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvLocalEndpointUpdated, endpoint)
   222	
   223	        By("Delete local Endpoint")
   224	
   225	        t.DeleteEndpoint(endpoint.GetName())
   226	
   227	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvLocalEndpointRemoved, endpoint)
   228	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvTransitionToNonGateway, nil)
   229	        t.ensureNoEvents()
   230	}
   231	
   232	func (t *testDriver) testRemoteEndpoints() {
   233	        By("Create first remote Endpoint")
   234	
   235	        endpoint1 := t.CreateEndpoint(testing.NewEndpoint("remote-cluster1", "host"))
   236	
   237	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointCreated, endpoint1)
   238	        Expect(t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()).To(Equal([]submV1.Endpoint{*endpoint1}))
   239	
   240	        By("Create second remote Endpoint")
   241	
   242	        endpoint2 := t.CreateEndpoint(testing.NewEndpoint("remote-cluster2", "host"))
   243	
   244	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointCreated, endpoint2)
   245	        Expect(t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()).To(ContainElements(*endpoint1, *endpoint2))
   246	
   247	        By("Update first remote Endpoint")
   248	
   249	        endpoint1.Labels = map[string]string{"labeled-i-am": "i-am"}
   250	        t.UpdateEndpoint(endpoint1)
   251	
   252	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointUpdated, endpoint1)
   253	
   254	        By("Delete second remote Endpoint")
   255	
   256	        t.DeleteEndpoint(endpoint2.GetName())
   257	
   258	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointRemoved, endpoint2)
   259	        Expect(t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()).To(Equal([]submV1.Endpoint{*endpoint1}))
   260	
   261	        By("Delete first remote Endpoint")
   262	
   263	        t.DeleteEndpoint(endpoint1.GetName())
   264	
   265	        t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointRemoved, endpoint1)
   266	        Expect(t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()).To(BeEmpty())
   267	        t.ensureNoEvents()
   268	}
   269	
   270	func (t *testDriver) testStaleRemovedEndpoint(tsDiff time.Duration) {
   271	        It("should notify the handler of the stale removed Endpoint", func() {
   272	                now := time.Now()
   273	                staleEndpoint := t.CreateEndpoint(&submV1.Endpoint{
   274	                        ObjectMeta: v1meta.ObjectMeta{Name: "stale", CreationTimestamp: v1meta.NewTime(now)},
   275	                        Spec:       submV1.EndpointSpec{ClusterID: "east"},
   276	                })
   277	                t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointCreated, staleEndpoint)
   278	
   279	                latestEndpoint := t.CreateEndpoint(&submV1.Endpoint{
   280	                        ObjectMeta: v1meta.ObjectMeta{Name: "latest", CreationTimestamp: v1meta.NewTime(now.Add(tsDiff))},
   281	                        Spec:       submV1.EndpointSpec{ClusterID: "east"},
   282	                })
   283	                t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointCreated, latestEndpoint)
   284	                Expect(t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()).To(HaveLen(2))
   285	
   286	                t.DeleteEndpoint(staleEndpoint.GetName())
   287	                t.awaitEvent(testing.EvStaleRemoteEndpointRemoved, staleEndpoint)
   288	                t.ensureNoEvents()
   289	                Expect(t.handler.remoteEndpoints.Load()).To(Equal([]submV1.Endpoint{*latestEndpoint}))
   290	
   291	                t.DeleteEndpoint(latestEndpoint.GetName())
   292	                t.awaitEvent(testing.EvRemoteEndpointRemoved, latestEndpoint)
   293	        })
   294	}
   295	
   296	type TestHandler struct {
   297	        *testing.TestHandler
   298	        remoteEndpoints atomic.Value
   299	}
   300	
   301	func (t *TestHandler) LocalEndpointCreated(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error {
   302	        defer GinkgoRecover()
   303	        Expect(t.State().IsOnGateway()).To(BeTrue())
   304	
   305	        return t.TestHandler.LocalEndpointCreated(endpoint)
   306	}
   307	
   308	func (t *TestHandler) LocalEndpointRemoved(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error {
   309	        defer GinkgoRecover()
   310	        Expect(t.State().IsOnGateway()).To(BeFalse())
   311	
   312	        return t.TestHandler.LocalEndpointRemoved(endpoint)
   313	}
   314	
   315	func (t *TestHandler) RemoteEndpointCreated(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error {
   316	        t.storeRemoteEndpoints()
   317	        return t.TestHandler.RemoteEndpointCreated(endpoint)
   318	}
   319	
   320	func (t *TestHandler) RemoteEndpointRemoved(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error {
   321	        t.storeRemoteEndpoints()
   322	        return t.TestHandler.RemoteEndpointRemoved(endpoint)
   323	}
   324	
   325	func (t *TestHandler) StaleRemoteEndpointRemoved(endpoint *submV1.Endpoint) error {
   326	        t.storeRemoteEndpoints()
   327	        return t.TestHandler.StaleRemoteEndpointRemoved(endpoint)
   328	}
   329	
   330	func (t *TestHandler) storeRemoteEndpoints() {
   331	        eps := t.State().GetRemoteEndpoints()
   332	        if eps == nil {
   333	                eps = []submV1.Endpoint{}
   334	        }
   335	
   336	        t.remoteEndpoints.Store(eps)
   337	}
